emails.subject: Congratulations
emails.body: Congratulations on your promotion to Vice President. Well deserved, and a nice recognition of your contributions to the success of the Calgary office. --Sally

emails.subject: Re: Congratulations
emails.body: Re: Congratulations Congratulations to you as well Sally! It is very encouraging to see a female Managing Director. All the best. Enron North America Corp. From: Sally Beck 01/12/2001 10:57 PM
